ConnectionStrings.Aspire_Comment: Running SkyLogg.Server.AppHost `overrides` the following connection strings at runtime.
ConnectionStrings.sqlite_Comment: To debug inside docker, change ConnectionStrings__sqlite's value in launchSettings.json
ConnectionStrings.smtp_Comment: You can also use https://ethereal.email/create for testing purposes.
ConnectionStrings.ConnectionStrings_Comment: The ConnectionStrings section contains database connection strings used by the application.

Identity.BearerTokenExpiration_Comment: BearerTokenExpiration used as JWT's expiration claim, access token's expires in and cookie's max age. Format: D.HH:mm:ss
Identity.MaxPrivilegedSessionsCount_Comment: Is the maximum number of concurrent privileged sessions a user can have.

Email_Comment: You can also use https://ethereal.email/create for testing purposes.

AdsPushVapid.AdsPushVapid_Comment: Web push's vapid. More info at https://d3v.one/vapid-key-generator/
AdsPushVapid.Subject: mailto:you@example.com
AdsPushVapid.PublicKey_Comment: Set public key in Client.Web's appsettings.json

AdsPushAPNS.P8PrivateKey_Comment: p8 certificate string without any space and start and end (-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY----- and -----END PRIVATE KEY-----) tags.
AdsPushAPNS.P8PrivateKeyId_Comment: 10-digit p8 certificate id; often part of a downloaded certificate filename
AdsPushAPNS.TeamId_Comment: 10-digit Apple team id shown on the Apple Developer Membership Page
AdsPushAPNS.EnvironmentType_Comment: Apns Env one of Development or Production

Hangfire.UseIsolatedStorage_Comment: Useful for testing or in production when managing multiple codebases with a single database.

Twitter.ConsumerSecret_Comment: Also known as API Key Secret

Apple.ClientId_Comment: Your Service Id's Identifier such as com.adminpanel.bitplatform.dev
Apple.TeamId_Comment: 10-digit Apple team id shown on the Apple Developer Membership Page
Apple.AppleAuthKey.p8_Comment: Download .p8 file and save it with AppleAuthKey.p8 name in bin directory

Keycloak.Keycloak_Comment: The base URL of your Keycloak server, e.g., https://keycloak.yourdomain.com/ or http://localhost:8080/

Authentication.Keycloak_Comment: Configure your Keycloak OpenId Connect configuration

TrustedOrigins_Comment: Lists the permitted origins for CORS requests, return URLs following external sign-in and email confirmation, etc., along with allowed origins for Web Auth.

ForwardedHeaders.ForwardedHeaders_Comment: These values apply only if your backend is hosted behind a CDN (such as `Cloudflare`).
ForwardedHeaders.ForwardedHostHeaderName_Comment: For Cloudflare, use X-Host instead of X-Forwarded-Host.

Cloudflare.AdditionalDomains_Comment: The ResponseCacheService clears the cache for the current domain by default. If multiple Cloudflare-hosted domains point to your backend, you will need to purge the cache for each of them individually.

WebAppRender.PrerenderEnabled_Comment: for apps with Prerender enabled, follow the instructions in the Client.Web/wwwroot/service-worker.published.js file
